Current_State: Manual download and Excel-based comparison of administrator NAV vs internal records taking 3 hours daily
Future_State: Automated data ingestion and reconciliation engine with real-time break detection completing in 15 minutes
Gap_Description: No automated reconciliation capability exists; entire process is manual and spreadsheet-based
Impact: High - risk of undetected NAV errors and delayed investor reporting
Dependencies: Administrator file format agreement; Fund Accounting System API availability

Current_State: Tolerance thresholds are informal and inconsistently applied across analysts
Future_State: Configurable tolerance thresholds per fund and data element with dual-authorisation change control
Gap_Description: No standardised or auditable tolerance framework; thresholds vary by analyst
Impact: Medium - inconsistent break identification across funds

Current_State: Break investigation tracked via email threads and ad-hoc notes
Future_State: Structured workflow with assignment; root cause categorisation; escalation rules; and audit trail
Gap_Description: No formal break management workflow; resolution history is difficult to retrieve
Impact: High - audit findings on control documentation

Current_State: Investment limit checks performed manually in Excel on a weekly basis using position downloads
Future_State: Real-time automated compliance engine monitoring UCITS 5/10/40 and concentration limits against live positions
Gap_Description: Compliance checks are periodic rather than continuous; breaches may go undetected for days
Impact: High - regulatory risk if breaches are not detected and reported within required timeframes
Dependencies: Position data feed from administrator and Fund Accounting System

Current_State: Derivative exposure and counterparty limits checked monthly via manual spreadsheet
Future_State: Automated daily calculation of derivative exposure and counterparty limits with breach alerting
Gap_Description: Monthly frequency insufficient under UCITS requirements; manual calculations are error-prone
Impact: High - potential regulatory breach if limits exceeded between checks

Current_State: Investor statements and factsheets produced manually using Word and Excel templates with copy-paste from multiple sources
Future_State: Automated report generation pulling data from a central data warehouse with templated outputs
Gap_Description: Manual report production takes 5 days per quarter and is prone to transcription errors
Impact: Medium - delayed investor communications and risk of data errors in published materials

Current_State: No centralised record of which investors received which reports and when
Future_State: Automated distribution log with delivery confirmation and read tracking
Gap_Description: Cannot demonstrate to regulators that all investors received required disclosures on time
Impact: Medium - regulatory risk around disclosure obligations

Current_State: Management fees and performance fees calculated in Excel with manual input of AUM and benchmark data
Future_State: Automated fee calculation engine with configurable fee structures and automated AUM data feeds
Gap_Description: Fee calculations rely on manual data entry increasing risk of billing errors
Impact: High - financial risk from over or under billing; reputational risk with investors
Dependencies: AUM data feed; fee schedule configuration

Current_State: No automated reconciliation between internally calculated fees and administrator-calculated fees
Future_State: Automated fee reconciliation with break detection and approval workflow
Gap_Description: Fee discrepancies between internal and administrator calculations identified only at quarter-end
Impact: Medium - delayed detection of fee errors affecting NAV accuracy

Current_State: CBI online returns and AIFMD Annex IV data compiled manually from multiple spreadsheets
Future_State: Automated data aggregation from source systems with pre-populated regulatory templates
Gap_Description: Manual data compilation takes 3-5 days per filing and requires significant review effort
Impact: Medium - risk of filing errors and missed deadlines
Dependencies: Central data warehouse; regulatory template library

Current_State: No automated tracking of regulatory filing deadlines and status
Future_State: Centralised regulatory calendar with automated reminders and escalation for approaching deadlines
Gap_Description: Risk of missed filing deadlines particularly during staff absence or high-volume periods
Impact: High - regulatory censure and potential fines for late filings

Current_State: Board packs assembled manually over 2 weeks from various departmental inputs in different formats
Future_State: Automated board pack generation with standardised templates pulling from central data sources
Gap_Description: Board pack preparation is labour-intensive and data may be inconsistent across sections
Impact: Medium - board members receive information late and in inconsistent formats
Dependencies: Central data warehouse; department data feeds

Current_State: No dashboard for board members to view fund performance and risk metrics between meetings
Future_State: Secure board portal with real-time dashboards showing key performance and risk indicators
Gap_Description: Board members have limited visibility between quarterly meetings; reliant on ad-hoc email updates
Impact: Low - reduced board oversight effectiveness between meetings

Current_State: Reconciliation results stored in individual analyst spreadsheets on shared drive with no version control
Future_State: Centralised database with full audit trail and 7-year retention compliant with regulatory requirements
Gap_Description: No single source of truth for historical reconciliation data; difficult to produce for audit
Impact: High - audit findings on record-keeping; inability to demonstrate control effectiveness over time

Current_State: SFDR periodic disclosures prepared manually with data sourced from multiple ESG data providers
Future_State: Automated ESG data aggregation and SFDR template population with data quality checks
Gap_Description: ESG data from multiple providers not integrated; manual consolidation increases error risk
Impact: Medium - regulatory risk from inaccurate sustainability disclosures
